name: TEST - Currency Mismatch (With Line Items) (CIB)
trigger_condition:
(
  not is_empty(field.line_items_present) and field.line_items_present == 'true'
  and not is_empty(field.po_backed) and field.po_backed == 'true'
  and not is_empty(field.currency)
  and (
    is_empty(field.item_po_line_currency_match)
    or field.currency.upper() != field.item_po_line_currency_match
  )
)

payload.content: The currency on the invoice is different from the PO line currency.
The currency on the invoice is different from the PO line currency.
